prod_status_reason: Operator decision 2026-06-06: animation polish needed before re-launching to the public. Re-launch checklist captured inline at src/app/framework/universe/page.tsx (3 steps).

prd.notes: OQ-1 + OQ-2 + OQ-3D-A all closed 2026-06-04; OQ-3 deferred (non-blocking). Phase 1 → Phase 2 approved.

isolation_opt_out_reason: Feature is state_owner=fitme-story (reverse-synced into FT2). Its FT2-side planning artifacts (prd/tasks/state) are updated across multiple framework PRs rather than a single feature/* branch, so BRANCH_ISOLATION_HISTORICAL fires by construction. Silenced per the documented path; the authoritative fitme-story copy should carry the same flag to survive reverse-sync (2026-06-10 self-test).

Stay 404 until the Rive reduced-motion fallback (T-rive-tier-2) is authored AND a full polish pass lands. T-rive-tier-2 is now the single re-launch blocker.
Operator default rec: approve ~200MB Playwright install for AC-10/AC-11/mobile e2e. Awaiting explicit confirm.
Keep lighthouse warn @0.8; flip to enforce >=0.95 after re-launch + 1-2wk calibration.

description: Next-pass layer ON TOP of the C5 ai-user-feedback-loop on-device reinforcement cycle (PR #572 in flight). D1 is research-heavy (5-7d est) and cross-platform — it spans iOS (consumes RecommendationMemory + extends AIOrchestrator), backend (cohort-level adoption signal aggregation OR privacy-preserving federated learning), and product surface (transparency UX: 'why did the AI suppress this?'). Phase 0 enumerates the candidate sub-features, the privacy/aggregation tradeoffs, the dependency on D1.a vs D1.b vs D1.c branch decisions, and the Phase 1 prerequisites BEFORE PRD-level commitment.
backlog_source: docs/product/backlog.md Planned RICE row 4.5 + 2026-05-31 tier carryover plan D1

dependencies_met.C5_ai_user_feedback_loop: in flight 2026-06-01 PR #572 — provides RecommendationMemory env-object + AIOrchestrator reinforcement-loop block + 3 new home_ai_feedback_* analytics events. D1 builds on top, NOT around.
dependencies_met.HADF_Phase_2_clustering: shipped 2026-05-01 → k=5 clusters, silhouette 0.5566; cohort-level fingerprinting infra in place

dependencies_gated_on.C5_reaches_implementation_complete: PR #572 must merge OR reach phases.implementation.ended_at before D1 PRD authoring (D1 references C5's APIs)
dependencies_gated_on.Phase_E_exits: v7.9 Phase E exits ~2026-06-04. D1 PRD authoring CAN start in Phase E (no new gates yet), but ENFORCEMENT of any new D1 gates waits until v7.9.1 build window opens.

open_decisions_at_phase_0.D1.a: Pure on-device extension: time-decay weighting on RecommendationMemory + lightweight per-user trend detection (signal acceptance trending up over 60d). Zero server-side. Privacy-preserving by construction.
open_decisions_at_phase_0.D1.b: Cohort-level adoption signal: anonymous aggregated counts of fraction of users who accept signal X shared via the existing cohort backend. Federated avg, k>=20 minimum cohort, no per-user data leaves device. Requires backend extension.
open_decisions_at_phase_0.D1.c: AI-suggested replacement: when a signal is suppressed, surface an alternative (e.g. dismissed protein_below -> try meal_timing_late instead). Requires LLM call OR pre-computed mapping table.
open_decisions_at_phase_0.D1.d: Suppression transparency UX: Why was this recommendation suppressed? affordance in Settings -> AI Feedback. Opens explanation showing the 3 dismissals + their dates + reasons.
open_decisions_at_phase_0.Phase_0_decision_required: Pick 2 of D1.a/b/c/d for Phase 1 PRD. Phase 0 enumerates tradeoffs but does NOT pre-commit. Recommendation: D1.a + D1.d (100% on-device, ~3.5 person-days).

transitions.reason: D1 from 2026-05-31 tier carryover plan (RICE 4.5, research-heavy 5-7d, pairs with C5). Operator directive: 'continue c3,c6,e4,d1 in sequence'. Phase 0 research draft only — D1 has 4 open candidate sub-features requiring decision before PRD authoring.

Phase 0 approved (operator: 'continue with D1, C6 and C3'). Phase 1 PRD locks recommended pair D1.a + D1.d. FROZEN constants: timeDecayLambda=0.0231 day^-1 (half-life 30d), trendDetectionWindow=60d, trendUnsuppressionAcceptanceFloor=0.50, manualUnsuppressionPersistence=14d, permanentBlacklistRevocation via clearAll, analyticsReinforcementMode confidenceTierOnly (inherited from C5). 4 new home_ai_feedback_* analytics events. 2 new source files + 6 modified. Data model: ManualUnsuppression + BlacklistedSignal new persisted fields. 100% on-device, no backend touch, no DPIA delta. 6 success metrics T1/T2/T3 tagged + 5 kill criteria. 6 OQ resolved. D1.b/c/e explicitly deferred to v8.0+.

Phase 1 PRD approved (operator: 'continue d1'). Phase 2 Tasks at .claude/features/adaptive-intelligence-next-pass/tasks.md — 9 discrete tasks T1-T9 with dependency graph, LoC estimates totaling ~835 (T1 analytics 70 + T2 memory 120 + T3+T4 detector+orchestrator 130 + T5+T6 detail screen+routing 195 + T7+T8 pbxproj+tests 320 + T9 case study 170). 6-commit Phase 4 landing order matching C3/C5/C6 single-session pattern. Out-of-scope guards (3) explicit. Estimated wall time ~3.5h. C5 dependency satisfied — RecommendationMemory + AIOrchestrator already on main.
Single-session Phase 4 ship (operator: 'continue d1'). 6 commits landing T1-T9. Pattern matches C3/C5/C6.

Phase 4 complete in 6 commits (T1 analytics infra, T2 RecommendationMemory fields, T3+T4 detector+orchestrator partition logic, T5+T6 SuppressedSignalDetailScreen + NavigationLink routing, T7+T8 pbxproj wiring + 21 tests all green, T9 case study + backlog strike). Build SUCCEEDED on iPhone 17 sim. 21/21 D1 tests PASS (2 analytics naming + 6 memory fields + 8 detector + 5 orchestrator integration). Case study at docs/case-studies/adaptive-intelligence-next-pass-case-study.md with 6 success metrics (5 T1 instrumented + 1 T2) and 5 kill criteria; T+30d eval at 2026-07-02. Backlog RICE 4.5 row struck in same commit. PR #576 ready for review.
PR #576 opened; CI checks green (Build and Test + integrity + CodeQL + GitGuardian); operator review.

Operator approved + squash-merged. PR #576 squashed onto main as ce5002277b711cbe9859c966d39ec068afb6a309. Pre-merge conflicts (5 files) resolved via merge of origin/main into D1 branch (pbxproj union of D1's SuppressedSignalDetailScreen entry + C6's 5 CustomProgram screens; analytics + backlog auto-merged; Package.resolved restored from main). xcodebuild Debug + D1 test suite re-run post-merge: clean.

Docs already shipped in PR #576 T9: docs/case-studies/adaptive-intelligence-next-pass-case-study.md (7 required frontmatter fields + 6 success metrics + 5 kill criteria) + docs/product/backlog.md RICE 4.5 strike + Tier 2.2 log entry. No additional docs needed.

Feature CLOSED. D1 (D1.a on-device decay+trend + D1.d transparency UX) shipped via PR #576 squash ce50022 (operator-merged 2026-06-02 18:33Z). Closure on chore/d1-post-merge-closure (feature branch merged + retained on remote; local merged-feature-branch deletion deferred per per-action approval rule). 21/21 D1 tests pass. T+14d eval 2026-06-16. T+30d eval 2026-07-02. D1.b/c/e deferred to v8.0+.
